name: Georgia pharmaceutical products electronic register
executiveSummary: Official searchable register of pharmaceutical products admitted to the Georgian market, including identifiers, names, active substances, authorization dates, ATC codes, dispensing groups, manufacturers, countries, and GMP indicators.
provider: Ministry of Internally Displaced Persons from the Occupied Territories, Labour, Health and Social Affairs of Georgia
geography: Georgia; products may be relevant to Tbilisi but are not geocoded stock records
updateCadence: Administrative/event-driven; exact publication lag is not stated
accessSummary: Unauthenticated ASP.NET WebForms search. A session-preserving POST for Georgian trade name პარაცეტამოლი returned 14 matches across two pages. The workflow depends on hidden ViewState fields and is not a documented API.
license: Unclear; public-register access was verified, but no explicit open-data reuse license was found
recordCount: 14 matches for the tested trade-name query; corpus total not enumerated

accessPoints.label: Public products register
accessPoints.notes: Search requires current hidden form fields and a session cookie; no published rate limit.

schemas.name: Pharmaceutical product result
schemas.description: One visible result row; labels preserve the official register terminology.

fields.meaning: Internal/registry product identifier displayed as ITDC
Additional name field in the state language
Strength, dosage form, and pack description

fields.example: აქვს GMP სერტიფიკატი და აკმაყოფილებს კრიტერიუმებს

samples.label: Paracetamol product row
samples.value: ITDC=045576; Geo NDC=045576; Georgian trade name=პარაცეტამოლი ჯენერისი 500 მგ ტაბლეტები MG; active substance=paracetamol; ATC=N02BE01; registration=29.05.2026; expiry=29.05.2031; dispensing=III ჯგუფი, გაიცემა რეცეპტის გარეშე

caveats: This is authorization/reference data, not pharmacy inventory, retail availability, transaction volume, or price
Undocumented WebForms automation is brittle
Blank cells and hidden columns require careful parsing
A public register is not automatically open-licensed
reliability: HTTP 200 search results were reproduced in a cookie-preserving session
The tested query reported 14 records and two pages
Identifiers and authorization dates support deduplication and change tracking
privacy: Product and company records are generally non-personal; interested-person fields may still require screening before republication

name: Georgia pharmacy and pharmaceutical-facility register
executiveSummary: Official searchable registry of pharmacy organizations and branches, with identifiers, registry numbers, names, legal form, phone, status, and filters for address, municipality, permissions, notification, and realization types.
provider: Ministry of Internally Displaced Persons from the Occupied Territories, Labour, Health and Social Affairs of Georgia
geography: Georgia; search filters include region, municipality, settlement, and branch address
updateCadence: Administrative/event-driven; exact publication lag is not stated
accessSummary: Unauthenticated ASP.NET WebForms search. An unfiltered session-preserving POST returned the first 10 of 6,949 records and exposed 695 result pages. Detail/branch drilldown was not exhaustively tested.
license: Unclear; no explicit open-data reuse license was found

accessPoints.label: Public pharmacy register
accessPoints.notes: Search depends on hidden ViewState fields and a session cookie.

schemas.name: Organization result
schemas.description: One row in the validated parent-organization result grid.

fields.example: საქართველოს შინაგან საქმეთა სამინისტროს ჯანმრთელობის დაცვის სამსახურის II ჯგ. აფთიაქი

fields.meaning: Legal form; source label spelling preserved
Hidden row key used for detail navigation

schemas.name: Branch and authorization search dimensions
schemas.description: Validated search controls; returned detail values were not exhaustively enumerated.

samples.label: Public-sector pharmacy organization
samples.value: identification code=203845349; registry number=[blank]; name=საქართველოს შინაგან საქმეთა სამინისტროს ჯანმრთელობის დაცვის სამსახურის II ჯგ. აფთიაქი; legal form=საჯარო სამართლის იურიდიული პირი; status=გაუქმებული; telephone=[redacted]

caveats: Registry status is not opening hours or real-time operational availability
No medicine inventory or retail stock is exposed
Organization list mixes legal persons and natural-person registrants
Branch/detail extraction needs separate validation
Undocumented WebForms automation is brittle
reliability: The live result grid returned HTTP 200
Pagination summary reported 6,949 records
Status and registry identifiers enable periodic change detection
privacy: The register can contain individual entrepreneurs and contact details; bulk use should minimize or remove natural-person names and phones

name: Georgia public-service vacancy portal
executiveSummary: Current official public-sector vacancy cards and detail pages with employer, position, competition type, category, location, salary, deadline, places, workload, functions, qualifications, stages, and public application-count summary.
provider: Civil Service Bureau of Georgia / hr.gov.ge
geography: Georgia; location filters include Tbilisi and employers include Tbilisi municipal bodies
updateCadence: Event-driven postings and deadlines; public pages reflect active vacancy state
accessSummary: Unauthenticated server-rendered vacancy list and detail pages. Applications require an account, but reading postings does not.
license: Unclear; public recruitment information, but no explicit open-data reuse license was found
recordCount: Dynamic; active list not counted in this validation

accessPoints.label: Validated vacancy detail
accessPoints.notes: Numeric vacancy IDs; a GeneratePDF link is present on detail pages.

schemas.name: Vacancy card
schemas.description: Fields visible in the current listing.

fields.example: მესამე რანგი - საჯარო დაწესებულების მეორე კატეგორიის უფროსი სპეციალისტი
გლდანის რაიონის გამგეობის საბიუჯეტო-საფინანსო და შესყიდვების განყოფილების მეორე კატეგორიის უფროსი სპეციალისტი

samples.label: Tbilisi municipal vacancy 100140
samples.value: organization=ქ. თბილისის მუნიციპალიტეტის მერია; category=შესყიდვები; location=თბილისი; salary=2240 ლარი; places=1; deadline=26.07.2026; applications=5; work type=სრული განაკვეთი

caveats: Listings expire and may be removed or moved to inactive views
The page showed a separate remaining-date value of 2026/07/27 while the labelled deadline was 26.07.2026; prefer the explicit deadline label
Application count is an aggregate, not applicant data
No documented machine API or reuse license was identified
reliability: List and detail pages returned HTTP 200
A current Tbilisi municipal vacancy was validated end to end
Stable vacancy numbers and PDF links aid archiving
privacy: Vacancy records are organizational; do not attempt to identify applicants from aggregate application counts

name: Georgia electronic auction active lots
executiveSummary: Official active-auction listing fragments and lot pages with lifecycle status, location, dates, starting/current price, bid step, guarantee, asset attributes, cadastral reference, views, bid count, seller conditions, and attached registry documents.
geography: Georgia; city and organization filters include Tbilisi and municipal bodies
updateCadence: Event-driven auction lifecycle; exact cache and bid-update latency are undocumented
accessSummary: Unauthenticated public HTML. The homepage POST endpoint returned five current cards from 30 offers; a linked active Tbilisi lot detail returned full auction terms. The separate bidding service rejected direct calls and is not represented as reusable access.
license: Unclear; public auction terms and privacy pages are not an open-data license
recordCount: 30 current offers reported by the validated homepage fragment

accessPoints.label: Current-offer fragment
accessPoints.notes: Validated JSON body: Index and Count. Undocumented backend.

schemas.name: Offer card
schemas.description: Fields extracted from the current-offer HTML fragment.

fields.meaning: Total current offers in the fragment context

samples.label: Active Tbilisi real-estate lot 1297477
samples.value: status=Live/მიმდინარე; title=ქალაქი თბილისი ფონიჭალის დასახლება; auction=602324; start=10/07/2026 17:00; end=27/07/2026 18:00; starting price=1350000 GEL; step=5000 GEL; guarantee=100000 GEL; bids=0; cadastral code=01.18.13.039.047

caveats: Displayed price must be labelled starting versus current according to page context
Direct bidding-service calls failed and should not be treated as an API
Public availability can change at auction close
Asset descriptions and attachments are seller-provided
No open reuse license was found
reliability: Current-offer fragment and detail page both returned HTTP 200
IDs, dates, and financial terms were internally consistent
The lot page includes lifecycle and bid-summary fields suitable for change detection
privacy: Lot pages may publish contact phone numbers; omit them unless operationally necessary and legally justified
Do not infer occupant or owner identity from cadastral references

name: National Food Agency identified violations publications
executiveSummary: Official event publications about identified food-safety and veterinary violations, with publication date, category, title, detail narrative, operator/location context, findings, measures, sanctions, and quantities when disclosed.
geography: Georgia; detail narratives include Tbilisi establishments and incidents
updateCadence: Event-driven editorial publication; not every inspection is necessarily published
accessSummary: Unauthenticated paginated HTML archive and detail pages. Page 1 returned 10 records; page 20 returned 6, indicating roughly 196 archived publication cards at test time.
license: Unclear; official public notices, but no explicit open-data reuse license was found
recordCount: 20 result pages; 10 cards on page 1 and 6 on page 20 (approximately 196 cards)

accessPoints.label: Identified violations archive
accessPoints.notes: Pagination uses page and pageSize query parameters.

schemas.name: Violation publication card
schemas.description: One result card in the archive.

fields.meaning: Publication ID inferred from detail URL

fields.example: სურსათის ეროვნულმა სააგენტომ ქარელში ფრინველთა არალეგალური სასაკლაო გამოავლინა

schemas.name: Violation publication detail
schemas.description: Narrative fields commonly present in a publication; prose is not normalized.

fields.meaning: Official account of locations, findings, quantities, and measures

samples.label: Cold-storage inspection publication 1789
samples.value: date=22 Jun 2026; geography=Tbilisi and Adjara; finding=expired frozen fish and labeling violation; measure=operator fined and product sealed for destruction; affected quantity=6132.2 kg; operator identifiers omitted

caveats: This is a selective editorial publication archive, not a complete inspection-result database
Narrative fields require extraction and can change with corrections
A publication proves a disclosed finding at a stated time, not the current safety of an establishment
Approximate record count is inferred from pagination
reliability: Archive and detail pages returned HTTP 200
Current July 2026 publications were visible
Stable numeric detail IDs support citation and archiving
privacy: Details may identify operators, addresses, and registration numbers; preserve official context, minimize identifiers, and do not build reputational profiles or infer current non-compliance

name: Tbilisi Court of Appeals daily hearing schedule
executiveSummary: Official same-day hearing table for the Tbilisi Court of Appeals, listing date, time, courtroom, judge, and parties. It is operational and current but ephemeral, unstructured, and privacy-sensitive.
updateCadence: Daily page replacement/update; no archive guarantee was found
accessSummary: Unauthenticated HTML table. On 22 July 2026 the page showed a 22-07-2026 schedule with 27 data rows (28 tr elements including the header).
license: Unclear; judicial publicity does not itself establish an open-data reuse license

accessPoints.label: Daily schedule page
accessPoints.notes: The same route appears to be overwritten with the current schedule.

schemas.name: Scheduled hearing row
schemas.description: One row in the public schedule table.

fields.example: სსიპ სახელმწიფო ქონების ეროვნული სააგენტო, შპს „გრომ 001“

samples.label: Organization-only hearing row
samples.value: date=22.07.2026; courtroom=№1; parties=სსიპ სახელმწიფო ქონების ეროვნული სააგენტო, შპს „გრომ 001“; time and judge omitted from sample; natural-person rows omitted

caveats: Schedules can change after retrieval
No stable case ID is displayed in the table
The route is likely ephemeral and should not be assumed to provide history
Published data contains formatting anomalies and inconsistent masking
Court publicity is not permission for bulk profiling
reliability: The official page returned HTTP 200
The displayed date matched the retrieval date
Table headers and 27 data rows were directly counted
privacy: Many rows expose natural-person party names. Avoid bulk indexing, re-identification, sensitive-case inference, or joining against other person-level data; minimize retention and prefer organization-only examples.

name: Parliament of Georgia voting results
executiveSummary: Official session-level and deputy-level parliamentary voting pages with vote date, bill title and documents, parliamentary term, aggregate favor/opponent/did-not-vote/absent counts, and named member vote/presence rows.
geography: Georgia-wide national legislature; decisions affect Tbilisi and the country
updateCadence: Per parliamentary voting session; exact publication lag not stated
accessSummary: Public official session and detail pages were verified through the official domain and current indexed output. The website's undocumented web-api endpoint intermittently returned HTTP 500 during direct validation and is not promoted as dependable access.
license: Unclear; no explicit open-data reuse license was found on the voting-results surface
recordCount: Dynamic; current indexed list included votes dated 24-06-2026

schemas.name: Voting session list row
schemas.description: Columns displayed by the official sessions list.

fields.example: „წყლის რესურსების მართვის შესახებ“ საქართველოს კანონში ცვლილების შეტან…

fields.meaning: Aggregate displayed as did not vote

fields.notes: Official disclaimer says the system cannot reliably distinguish did-not-vote from absent without a member request.

schemas.name: Voting session detail
schemas.description: Bill context and member-level result table.

samples.label: Indexed 24 June 2026 session row
samples.value: date=24-06-2026; title=„წყლის რესურსების მართვის შესახებ“ საქართველოს კანონში ცვლილების შეტანა…; parliament=11th Term; favor=79; opponent=0; did not vote=22; absent=22

caveats: Direct API calls were unstable and returned HTTP 500 during final validation
English pages contain Georgian titles and labels
The official disclaimer says the voting system cannot itself distinguish did-not-vote from absence
Member-level results are personal public-office records and should not be repurposed outside civic-accountability context
reliability: Official pages and current session-table content were page-verified
Stable numeric session URLs and legislative document numbers support citation
Depend on rendered pages or archived snapshots until the backend stabilizes
privacy: Named voting behavior is part of public parliamentary duty; still avoid unrelated profiling or linkage to private-person data

name: Tbilisi municipal ideas and petition lifecycle
executiveSummary: Official Tbilisi client of Georgia's municipal-ideas platform, exposing idea titles, categories, descriptions, budgets, execution periods, signatures, status lifecycle, and timestamps. The underlying public response also exposes excessive author PII and therefore requires a strict minimization boundary.
provider: Municipal Services Development Agency / Tbilisi City Hall client
accessSummary: The official Angular portal uses an unauthenticated public JSON search for Tbilisi's client. A minimized validation returned 1,471 ideas and current 2026 records. The raw response also returned personal ID, email, phone, and birth date; the bulk route is intentionally not reproduced here.
license: Unclear; no explicit open-data reuse license was found, and public display does not justify reuse of exposed personal data
recordCount: 1,471 Tbilisi idea records at test time; zero records in the active statusIds [3,-3] query

accessPoints.label: Official municipal ideas portal
accessPoints.notes: The application invokes a public search service scoped to Tbilisi client 41. The copy-paste bulk endpoint is withheld because its response exposes excessive author PII.

schemas.name: Municipal idea
schemas.description: Fields observed in the Tbilisi search response. Sensitive author values are never reproduced.

fields.notes: Observed malformed/extreme date values in some records.

fields.meaning: Author full name exposed by the response
fields.notes: Sensitive; exclude from downstream datasets unless strictly necessary.

fields.meaning: Author personal identification number exposed by the response
fields.notes: Highly sensitive; never retain or republish.

fields.meaning: Author email exposed by the response
Author phone exposed by the response
Author birth date exposed by the response

samples.label: Redacted Tbilisi idea 11004
samples.note: All author PII and free-text description omitted.

caveats: The public response exposes personal data far beyond what is needed to understand an idea
No active records matched statusIds [3,-3] at validation time despite 1,471 total historical/current-state records
Status IDs need the portal's client mapping and include negative overdue variants
Submitted budget and execution-period values are user-entered and can be malformed
No open reuse license was found
reliability: The official portal and its Tbilisi-scoped search returned HTTP 200
The response reported 1,471 records and current 2026 timestamps
Stable IDs, timestamps, and status-log IDs support lifecycle tracking
privacy: Critical: never collect, store, display, or redistribute authorPid, authorEmail, authorPhone, or authorBirthDate from this feed
Minimize author names and free text because descriptions can contain phone numbers, addresses, health details, or other volunteered PII
A privacy-preserving ingestion layer should explicitly allowlist civic fields and discard the rest before logging or caching
The raw bulk endpoint is intentionally omitted from this inventory
